description: At the Lighthouse, Mack checks on Elena as she adjusts to her new arms during a training session. He expresses concern for her safety, and they share a moment of tension about her newfound invincibility and Mack's protective instincts.

transcript.line: Mm. Hey, Simmons was right. She said you might become stronger than before, but you're murdering that heavy bag.
Yeah. Feels good to not be laying on a bed for once.
Yeah, well, maybe... maybe don't push too hard, though. We just put those things on you.
I'm fine. I'm just getting used to them.
Mm-hmm. Look, I know you like to do things fast, but you don't know your strength yet. So maybe a little caution couldn't hurt for a change.
I know that speech by heart.
Well, you're the one talking about how you're indestructible and saying you can't die. How was I supposed to take that?
I guess it was just, uh, the pain medication talking.

Yeah. Well, you can at least hydrate. Okay, Pacquiao? And later on, I can run a diagnostic on those arms. What? Don't look at me like that. What, I'm not babying you. I'm a mechanic. A well-oiled machine needs oil.
